---
title: "Michał Adamczyk"
subtitle: "Data science & analytics consultant · ex-BCG"
image: ""   # TODO: add a headshot, e.g. profile.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/        # TODO
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:michal.adamczyk@rtbhouse.com
toc: false
---

I help companies turn data into decisions — and into profit. Over close to a
decade I've sat on both sides of the table: as a **strategy consultant** shaping
recommendations for boardrooms, and as a **data scientist** building the models
and experiments that back those recommendations up. I started in management
consulting at **BCG**, then moved deep into data science and machine learning.
Today I work as an independent expert advising teams that want rigour, not hype.

What that combination buys you: I can frame the business question like a
consultant, solve it like a data scientist, and ship it like an engineer —
without three different people losing the plot in between.

## How I help

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .pillar}
### Strategy & consulting
Structuring ambiguous problems, working directly with stakeholders, and turning
analysis into recommendations people actually act on. The BCG-trained half of
the toolkit.
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .pillar}
### Data science & ML
End-to-end modelling — forecasting, optimization, real-time bidding, causal
inference and experimentation — chosen for the problem, not for the buzzword.
:::
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-4 .pillar}
### Technical delivery
Production-grade Python on GCP and Databricks, plus the visualization and
communication that make a result land instead of dying in a notebook.
:::
:::

## Selected engagements

Across financial services, manufacturing, AdTech, retail and FMCG — from
boardroom strategy to production machine learning.

[See my project portfolio →](portfolio.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}

## What I bring to the table

::: {.capabilities}
- Causal inference
- A/B testing & experimentation
- Forecasting
- Optimization
- Real-time bidding & RL
- Marketing measurement
- Python · pandas · scikit-learn · PySpark
- XGBoost / LightGBM
- GCP · Databricks
- Tableau
:::

## Background

The consulting instincts sit on a genuinely technical foundation. I hold degrees
in **Mathematics** and **Computer Science** — with theses on PCA / SVD and on
stacking ensembles — and I'm a **Kaggle Competition Expert**. Before data
science I built quantitative analytics for a global investment bank's commodities
desk, so the numbers-under-pressure instinct runs deep.

This site is where I think out loud: long-form analyses, notes on papers I'm
reading, and breakdowns of what's actually moving in the industry — every chart
generated by code you can read.

Outside work I'm a long-distance runner and triathlete: ultramarathons, a 3:19
marathon, and Ironman races. Useful training for the kind of problem that
doesn't resolve in an afternoon.

**Open to consulting and advisory engagements** — [get in touch](mailto:michal.adamczyk@rtbhouse.com).
